title: The Locked Drawer
content: While cleaning an old desk, Lily discovered a drawer that would not open. She searched every shelf for a key but found nothing. Curious, she asked her grandfather about it. He smiled and remembered that the key had been hidden inside a small wooden box in the attic. When they finally opened the drawer, they found postcards, old coins, and several letters written many years ago. The small collection revealed wonderful stories about the family's past.
